scripts.clean:node: rm -rf node_modules/ && rm -rf apps/*/node_modules && rm -rf packages/*/node_modules && rm -rf packages/*/dist && rm -rf apps/*/dist && rm -rf apps/*/.next && rm -rf .turbo/ && rm -rf apps/*/.turbo && rm -rf packages/*/.turbo && rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml
scripts.clean:builds: rm -rf packages/*/dist && rm -rf apps/*/dist && rm -rf apps/*/.next && rm -rf .turbo/ && rm -rf apps/*/.turbo && rm -rf packages/*/.turbo
scripts.publish-packages: turbo run build --filter=@team14/cms-library && changeset publish --provenance --access public
